category_sources: Official Tarsnap documentation describes the Tarsnap client, backups, key generation, configuration, and archive operations; source_facts.description says online backups.
display_name_sources: Official site and documentation use Tarsnap; source_facts.name is tarsnap.
docs_sources: Official Tarsnap documentation page links to getting started, simple usage, general usage, tips, man pages, detailed help, helper scripts, FAQ, and technical details.
repo_sources: Official Tarsnap open-source/download pages link to the Tarsnap GitHub repository for reviewing client source and watching changes in progress.
tags_sources: Official Tarsnap docs cover command-line archive creation, restore, key management, and client source; source_facts.executables lists tarsnap utilities.
